name: Horror Granny Playtime
description: This is a horror online hide-and-seek game. If you like the thrill of hide and seek, this game is for you. As the searching party, you must find everyone within the time limit. They may turn into objects in the scene to hide and confuse you. The game fails if you dont catch everyone in the allotted time. You can watch the adverts to view the clues if you cant find them. Welcome to the wonderful adventure world of hide and seek, start the game now.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
